name: Underdocumented
label: Only a brief exists
generatorInstruction: Generate a thin, 1-page document. Leave obvious gaps — no success metrics, no edge cases, no non-functional requirements. The tone suggests it was written in a hurry.

name: Contradictory
label: Brief conflicts with meeting notes
generatorInstruction: Generate a document that contains at least two internal contradictions — for example, a stated goal that conflicts with a listed constraint, or an acceptance criterion that cannot be satisfied given the described technical limitation. Do not flag the contradictions explicitly.

name: Well-formed
label: Solid PRD with minor gaps
generatorInstruction: Generate a thorough, well-structured document with clear goals, acceptance criteria, and non-functional requirements. Leave one or two minor ambiguities a sharp Developer or QA would catch — but nothing egregious.
